Video.summary: Emeril's in the kitchen to help you bring the best breakfast to the table. Plus, recipes: Kicked-Up Coffee, Fluffy Biscuits with Sausage Gravy, and more.
Video.title: Entertaining with Emeril

Video.summary: Emeril hosts culinary students from his alma mater, Johnson & Wales University.
Video.title: Gumbo 101

Video.summary: Emeril and Abita CEO Dave Blossman enjoy a beer-centric menu.
Video.title: with Dave Blossman

Video.summary: Emeril prepares coffee-infused recipes.
Video.title: Coffee: Sneaky Flavor Enhancer in Savory Dishes

Video.summary: Emeril whips up diner favorites.
Video.title: Diner Classics

Video.summary: Emeril offers some delicious meatless entrees.
Video.title: Vegetarian Main Courses

Video.summary: Add Italian flair to your next dinner with Emeril's favorites.
Video.title: Italian Favorites

Video.summary: Emeril shows New Orleans Saints player Juwan Johnson how to prepare a classic Big Easy dinner.
Video.title: with Juwan Johnson, Chanen Johnson

Video.summary: Emeril shares the accessible and sustainable virtues of southern caviar.
Video.title: Sustainable Luxury: Southern Caviar

Video.summary: Emeril shares the tale of two Louisiana surfers who stumbled on the perfect seaside snack!
Video.title: A Surfer's Discovery: Sea Beans

Video.summary: Emeril turns up the heat and turns the spotlight on Louisiana hot sauce!
Video.title: No Pain, No Gain: Louisiana Hot Sauce

Video.title: with Bau Nguyen

Video.title: Los Angeles Chargers

Video.summary: Emeril and his friend Chef Aaron Sanchez enjoy a Cuban-inspired menu, with a New Orleans spin.
Video.title: with Aaron Sanchez

Video.summary: For a Texas-style tailgate, impress your guests with Emeril's take on the state's faves.
Video.title: Dallas Cowboys

Video.summary: For a New York-style tailgate, keep it old school with Emeril's favorite deli inspired classics.
Video.title: New York Giants
